ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "solution_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the solution */,
  "k_value" REAL /* K value associated with the solution */,
  "time_sec" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "fitness" REAL /* Fitness score of the solution */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the solution was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the solution was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ga_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parameter set */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution this parameter set belongs to */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size used in the GA */,
  "selection_method" TEXT /* Selection method (e.g., Tournament, Roulette) */,
  "crossover_type" TEXT /* Crossover method (e.g., Arithmetic, Single-point) */,
  "crossover_prob" REAL /* Probability of crossover */,
  "mutation_prob" REAL /* Probability of mutation */,
  "stopping_criteria" TEXT /* Stopping criteria for the GA */,
  "elitism_rate" REAL /* Rate of elitism used in the GA */,
  "mutation_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for mutation (e.g., random, adaptive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ga_parameters_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solution_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the solution */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the solution was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_access_logs_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_results" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution result */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution this execution result belongs to */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* A JSON or string representation of the execution data */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the execution was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_results_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness metric entry */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution this metric pertains to */,
  "avg_fitness" REAL /* Average fitness score across executions */,
  "max_fitness" REAL /* Maximum fitness score achieved */,
  "min_fitness" REAL /* Minimum fitness score achieved */,
  "std_dev_fitness" REAL /* Standard deviation of fitness scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_metrics_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user collaborating */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the contribution made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Numeric rating value given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user about the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related solution */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution that caused the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., runtime, syntax) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for this session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user logged out */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solution_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_tags_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solution_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solution this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_comments_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solution_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
